top.text:
3 games at Wrigley against the Brewers, starting TONIGHT.

Imanaga (4-3, 2.32 ERA) vs Sproat (1-2, 5.75 ERA). Cubs lead the NL Central, Cardinals are 1.5 back, Brewers are chasing.

First pitch: 6:40 PM CT. Division series. Let's go.

#Cubs

White Sox 8, Cubs 3. Series tied 1-1.

Murakami went YARD twice. Five White Sox HRs off Taillon in 5 innings. Davis Martin: 6 IP, 1 ER, 7 Ks.

PCA and Amaya homered. Not enough.

Rubber game today, 1:10 PM CT.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

Tonight: Cubs at White Sox. 6:40 PM CT. Guaranteed Rate Field.

Edward Cabrera (3-1, 3.88 ERA) takes on Sean Burke (2-3, 3.68 ERA) in the Crosstown Classic opener.

Game 1 of 3. Cubs rolling with momentum off a 2-0 shutout.

#Cubs #GoCubs #

Cubs lead the NL Central — but the division is tightening.

Cardinals within striking distance. Brewers riding a four-game win streak with Misiorowski emerging.

The rotation is a real risk. Every series counts now.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB

Ben Brown now has TWO consecutive starts.

In his second turn: 4 innings, 1 hit, SEVEN strikeouts, 0 runs.

With Horton out until 2027, Steele post-All-Star, Boyd 6 weeks gone — Brown isn't a fill-in. He's the answer.

#Cubs #GoCubs #Chicag

Ben Brown's next start: Tuesday vs the Brewers at Wrigley.

Two straight outings: 4 IP, 0 ER, 7 K each. The righty isn't filling in — he's taking over.

Pitch count expanding. NL Central, take notes.

#Cubs #GoCubs #NorthSiders

Cards at 25-18 and climbing. Misiorowski just threw 6 shutout innings for the Brewers. Yelich working his way back.

The NL Central is ALIVE — and the Cubs at 29-16 are leading it with a target on their backs.

Feels right.

#Cubs #NorthSid

Happ's BA is .234. His wRC+ is 144. 👀

10 HRs. 424 feet. Team lead. That's an ELITE power profile doing the work.

Tight game vs. Sale? He didn't care.

#Cubs #FlyTheW #GoCubs

Back-to-back walk-offs. 🌪️

Elly De La Cruz handed us that one gift-wrapped. We'll take it.

Two nights. Two comeback wins. Two Reds meltdowns.

Cincinnati might need therapy after this series.

#Cubs #FlyTheW #GoCubs

Four straight losses. Now Sale on the mound and Ben Brown answering the call.

Not ideal. But Brown's been scrappy.

The lineup NEEDS to wake up. Brewers are next.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubNation

3-game skid ends tonight. That's the assignment.

Imanaga vs. baseball's hottest lineup. We've seen this movie before. 🎯

Sale looms tomorrow — Shota needs to set the tone NOW.

#Cubs #GoCubs #WrigleyField

Imanaga gave 'em 7+ innings of FILTH and still walked away with an L.

That's the most frustrating sentence in baseball.

Ace did his job. Now the rest need to catch up.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubNation

Cubs won 3-2 over the Reds. 🏆

Close one at Wrigley, but we'll TAKE it.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

Dansby left with a left glute cramp. Not ideal.

Two-run double off his old college roommate first. Stolen third after. Then gone.

Cramp, not a strain. Should be fine.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

Kingery and Velasquez cleared waivers, outrighted to Iowa.

Both can elect free agency if they want out.

Roster chess. Not flashy — but keeping the 40-man clean matters.

#Cubs #CubsBaseball #MLB

Poached Peralta — right off the Cardinals' trash pile. 😄

Luis Peralta, LHP, headed to Triple-A Iowa for bullpen depth. Younger brother of Freddy Peralta. St. Louis cut him loose.

We'll take that, thanks.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubNation

Tuesday's game is the one to watch.

Ben Brown (1.60 ERA) faces Jacob Misiorowski — the MLB leader in K/9 at 14.0 strikeouts per nine. Brown is 2-0 in his career vs Milwaukee with 19 Ks in 18 innings.

Two of the best young arms in the NL.

White Sox 8, Cubs 3. Series tied 1-1.

Murakami went YARD twice. Five White Sox HRs off Taillon in 5 innings. Davis Martin: 6 IP, 1 ER, 7 Ks.

PCA and Amaya homered. Not enough.

Rubber game today, 1:10 PM CT.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

Seiya's running brace-free 🙏 Progress is real.

But sliding's the final test — and they're not rushing it. Timeline's longer than hoped.

Take the time, Seiya. We NEED you right.

#Cubs #CubsBaseball #GoCubs

White Sox 8, Cubs 3. Series tied 1-1.

Murakami went YARD twice. Five White Sox HRs off Taillon in 5 innings. Davis Martin: 6 IP, 1 ER, 7 Ks.

PCA and Amaya homered. Not enough.

Rubber game today, 1:10 PM CT.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

Crosstown Classic Game 2 tonight: Colin Rea (4-2) vs Erick Fedde (0-4, 3.77 ERA).

Fedde has a solid ERA but zero wins — Sox just can't score behind him. Cubs erupted for 14 hits last night.

Rate Field. 6:10 PM CT. Take the series lead.

#

Imanaga was FILTHY. The bats? Ice cold for 4 straight.

Braves 4, Cubs 1. A gem wasted.

4 runs in 4 games. That's the whole offense. Something's gotta give. 😤

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubNation

bottom_performers.text:
Hoerner set the table. Bregman did damage. PCA finished it. 🔥

Three guys. One statement win over San Diego.

This lineup is built different.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

Ben Brown FROZE Ty France — and nobody called it.

ABS overturned it. Inning over. Lead preserved.

That's the system working exactly how it should. Don't waste that challenge, folks.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubNation

Mason Miller hadn't allowed a run since August 5, 2025.

The Cubs ended that last night.

A barely fair ball did what NOBODY else could.

#Cubs #FlyTheW #MLB

.387/.435/.710. Through 69 PAs. As a DH. 👀

Ballesteros is a TOP-33 WAR player in ALL of baseball right now.

Let the man catch. Give him every edge for ROY.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubNation

Riley Martin went from kicking down doors to the IL in two weeks. 😔

Flexor strain. Eight weeks. Out into late June.

The bullpen needed him. Now they need someone else to step up.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubNation
